use_cases: Space-saving navigation buttons that expand on click to reveal text labels
Mobile-responsive action buttons with collapsible text content
Interactive toolbar buttons with icon-only and full modes
Expandable menu triggers for dashboard and admin interfaces
Action buttons that gracefully handle varying screen sizes
ai_summary: An animated expandable button component that smoothly transitions between a compact icon-only state and an expanded state with full text. Uses spring-based physics for natural motion and supports both controlled and uncontrolled state management. Ideal for responsive interfaces needing space-efficient interactive elements that maintain discoverability.
